Print-ready art

We Learn Through Connection

Four ways to weave the ConnectEd Circles flower-of-life mark into your bears illustration. Each file is a 1200×1400 PNG — ready to hand to a print shop.

AFlower-of-Life Frame
The logo geometry becomes the circle around the bears. Most integrated — the brand and the story are the same shape.
BClassic + Signature
Keeps your original illustration untouched. Flower mark + wordmark appear below as a horizontal signature — the safest, most versatile option.
CWatermark Halo
Large flower-of-life blooms softly behind the scene. Italic wordmark below. Feels like a keepsake — good for staff shirts or family gifts.
DDark Green Colorway
Same structure as B, but cream on sage — the deep green from your site. Mark + wordmark in a horizontal lockup. Reads as real merch.

Before you print

The "CONNECTION LATSEA" sign in the background of your AI illustration is gibberish text — any print shop or designer can clean that up (either remove it or swap in "ConnectEd Circles"). Worth fixing before production.

My recommendation: Option A is the most distinctive — the flower-of-life holds the bears, so brand and message are one shape. Option B is the safest fallback. Option D would look beautiful on an actual sage-green shirt.

These PNGs are at tshirt/design-A-flower-frame.png through design-D-dark.png — download them from the file pane and hand to your printer.
